creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
Again...

Update port: editors/emacs20

*** please close its ports/8738 ***

When we want to link xpg4 library to emacs20 binary,
we apply this patch and do as follows:
  $ make USE_XPGLIB=YES

Of course, default is USE_XPGLIB=NO.
That is, we do not link xpg4 library by default.

In this send-pr, I make patches for configure.in and src/config.in,
and let configure script accept --with-xpg4 option.

If you want to link xpg4 library by default, you add the following 
lines to your /etc/make.conf:
---
# If you want to use XPG4 library.
# This library supports many locales such as ja_JP.EUC, ko_KR.EUC...
USE_XPGLIB=	YES
---

Thank you.
--- shige
